mapper.sql: SELECT l.*, u.full_name AS photographer_name FROM listings l JOIN users u ON l.photographer_id = u.id
mapper.select: WHERE l.active = true ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
WHERE l.photographer_id = #{photographerId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listings (photographer_id, title, description, category, price, duration_minutes, location, max_concurrent, active) VALUES (#{photographerId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{price}, #{durationMinutes}, #{location}, #{maxConcurrent}, #{active})
